code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_AuthVault] --> New
    state New {FinTech_AuthVault] --> Incomplete
        Incomplete --> DataComplete : FormSubmission
    }
    New --> InReview
    state InReview {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> AwaitingLegalReview
        AwaitingLegalReview --> AwaitingResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingResponse --> AwaitingLegalReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingLegalReview --> OutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_if_state <<choice>>
        OutcomeProvided --> legal_if_state
        legal_if_state --> LegalApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_if_state --> LegalRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        LegalApproved --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
        LegalRejected --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]
        --
        [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> AwaitingIPScan
        AwaitingIPScan --> IpScanComplete
        state ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpScanComplete --> ip_if_state
        ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if ScanOutcome == no_findings
        ip_if_state --> AwaitingIpReview: if ScanOutcome == inconclusive
        ip_if_state --> IpRejected: if ScanOutcome == findings
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIpResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingIpResponse --> AwaitingIpReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingIpReview --> IpOutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpOutcomeProvided --> legal_ip_if_state
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpApproved --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
        IpApproved --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
        --
        [FinTech_FraudDetection] --> AwaitingSecurityScan
        AwaitingSecurityScan --> SecurityScanComplete
        state security_if_state <<choice>>
        SecurityScanComplete --> security_if_state
        security_if_state --> SecurityApproved: if no_findings
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if inconclusive
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if security findings
        SecurityApproved --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityRejected --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityApproved --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
        SecurityRejected --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
    }
    state inreview_if_state <<choice>>
    InReview --> inreview_if_state
    inreview_if_state --> Rejected: One or more check failed
    inreview_if_state --> Approved: All checks pass
    Approved --> NonCompliant: Periodic IP or security scan raises noncompliance
    NonCompliant --> Retired: Noncompliance not mitigated
    NonCompliant --> Approved: Compliance issue resolved
    Approved --> Retired: Repository no longer required
    Rejected --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
    Retired --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
repo_description: This tool allows an organization to manage users, and their association to a public GitHub, and a private GitHub enterprise (for InnerSource.)
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech AuthVault设计一个完整的状态流转图，覆盖从新建到最终归档的全生命周期。核心场景是：组件提交表单后进入评审，评审里要并行处理法务审查、知识产权扫描和安全扫描三个维度。
明白了，三个审查维度是并行在InReview这个大状态里吗？还是串行？另外法务审查和IP扫描看起来都涉及LegalQuestionsRaised和LegalResponsesProvided这样的往返交互，我需要确认它们的命名是否区分。
对，三个审查都在InReview内部并行。法务审查和IP审查的交互模式确实类似，但IP审查那边用Ip前缀区分，比如AwaitingIpReview和AwaitingIpResponse。另外IP扫描有个特殊分支：如果扫描结果inconclusive，才进入人工复核AwaitingIpReview；clean的直接IpApproved，有findings的直接IpRejected。

好的，我先画出New状态的子结构：从AuthVault开始，经过Incomplete到DataComplete，由FormSubmission触发。然后进入InReview。法务审查这边我放了AwaitingLegalReview，支持LegalQuestionsRaised和LegalResponsesProvided的循环，直到LegalOutcomeProvided进入choice节点，分支到LegalApproved或LegalRejected。

法务审查通过后应该流向FraudDetection，被拒的回到TransactionQueue重新排队。IP审查这边更复杂：IpApproved去LedgerService，IpRejected去FraudDetection，而且无论IpApproved、IpRejected还是AwaitingIpReview，只要Dependencies modified都要回到AwaitingIPScan重新扫描。
安全扫描这边我注意到你提到Code updates identified会回到AwaitingSecurityScan，这是和IP扫描的Dependencies modified类似的机制吗？另外安全扫描的结果分支是no_findings到SecurityApproved，其他情况包括inconclusive都到SecurityRejected？

是的，安全扫描更严格，inconclusive也算SecurityRejected。SecurityApproved回到AuthVault，SecurityRejected回到FraudDetection。最后InReview整体要有个出口判断：全部通过走Approved，任一失败走Rejected。Approved之后还有运行期风险——Periodic IP or security scan raises noncompliance会进入NonCompliant状态。
elements_involved: Periodic IP or security scan raises noncompliance

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 已补充：NonCompliant可以 resolved 回到Approved，或者未缓解进入Retired。另外Approved和Rejected都有直接到Retired的路径——Approved是Repository no longer required，Rejected是回到AuthVault。等等，Retired应该也回到AuthVault形成闭环？

Rejected和Retired都要回到AuthVault，但路径含义不同：Rejected是整改后重新提交，Retired是彻底下线。你刚才说的Approved直接到Retired是对的，但Rejected到AuthVault不是Retired，让我确认下——对，Rejected -- [FinTech_AuthVault]是独立路径，Retired -- [FinTech_AuthVault]是另一个。

清楚了，Rejected直接回AuthVault重新进入流程，Retired也是回AuthVault但代表生命周期结束。最终结构确认：New含Incomplete/DataComplete；InReview含法务、IP、安全三条并行审查线，各自有choice分支和循环机制；InReview出口有Approved/Rejected；Approved后可能NonCompliant；所有终止态最终收敛回AuthVault。
